## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🎨 UI / design refinement
- [ ] 🛠 Build / packaging / CI
- [ ] 📝 Docs or landing page only
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor (no functional change)

## Related issues

<!-- Link any related issues: "Closes #123" or "Relates to #45". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] I kept the PR scope small and focused (one task per PR)
- [ ] I did not commit local music files, packaged builds, or scratch notes (see [`docs/repository-hygiene.md`](../docs/repository-hygiene.md))
- [ ] UI changes stay inside the warm-dark editorial direction in [`docs/brand.md`](../docs/brand.md)
- [ ] I updated [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) under an appropriate section if this change is user-visible

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, please include before/after screenshots or a short screen recording. -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, known limitations. -->
